conflict: The service infrastructure of the gala needs Beni's labor at the exact moment Nina offers him a life built on permanent discretion, and his poverty makes the offer genuinely tempting.
consequence: Beni privately rejects Nina's offer after recognizing it as a more elegant version of the side-door life he has been living.
must_land_beats: Build suspense through preparation, timing, and dread rather than through action mechanics.
Use service corridors, delivery doors, and staff choreography to literalize the novel's class structure.
Let Nina's Paris offer contain real comfort so the refusal costs something.
End with Beni's decision still internal, increasing pressure on the gala itself.
objective: Get through gala preparations and decide whether Nina's offer of Paris is rescue or erasure.
